reviews.review_title: Not what I thought not what I need.
reviews.review_description: I'm actually thinking of building a woodworking shop in my basement and thought this would be a helpful instructional tool. The lathe you start with looks industrial if at all accurate. I was hoping for a benchtop hand lathe to practice on. Then you actually have to earn money game style grind to get the next tool which was taking forever and I gave up quickly. I just wanted to experience the tools and learn how they operate. It's a free app so I can't criticize anything else but as an instructional tool it didn't seem helpful.
As a machinist, I appreciate this a lot lol

A truly excellent and relaxing simulation. However, some minor adjustments could enhance the game's visibility. For instance, replacing the current inconspicuous game icon with one that could capture more attention from players. While the gameplay is flawless, minor graphical improvements and the addition of a few extra levels could further enrich the experience. Personally, I would be willing to purchase the full version with these enhancements.

developer_response.body: Hey dnkii, thanks for the review! Machineshop Simulator is one of our hidden gems. We really enjoy people providing positive feedback to it!

reviews.review_description: Y'all have something here! This is really good and it's very relaxing. I love the music everything's easy to understand. Thank y'all for that! Great job guys! Keep up the great work.
I didn’t think I would play this game for so long but it’s so addictive.
If you would like to learn how it is to be an operator for a CNC, this game is just for you.
I realize it's a demo. I can't wait for more. I clicked on that box to get the game for free, but its not working. When do we get more??

developer_response.body: Thank you for your interest and feedback on our game. We're excited to share that new chapters are currently in development. We deeply appreciate your patience and support. Stay tuned for more immersive experiences coming your way!"

reviews.review_description: I want this to be a good game and it looks cool but it just won’t work. I finally got to where I could put a piece of wood on the lathe but it just keeps crashing. Keep working on it devs.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the comment. We tried to reproduce the error but it seems like everything works fine. Also, there is no crash report sent to us. If you can give more details about the problem, we would like to help you. You can also send us an email to this address nomad@nomadmonkey.xyz
